47.reason: Array out-of-bounds access: when qt reaches 1000000, a[qt] accesses index 1000000, which exceeds the valid range [0, 999999] for an array of size 1000000.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  Sets a[qt] which is one beyond the valid index range; later the while loop may access a[i+1] when i becomes qt-1, causing out-of-bounds.

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [This writes to a[qt] after incrementing qt, so a[0] remains 0 (from above), a[1]=1, ..., a[qt-1]=qt-1, but a[qt] is set beyond used range. Should be a[qt-1] = qt-1 or initialize before increment.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [This writes to a[qt] after incrementing qt, so a[0] is never set in the loop. Combined with the prior a[0]=0, it leads to inconsistent indexing. Also, if qt reaches 1000000, this overflows a[].]

51.reason: Logical error: modifying the loop variable i inside the while loop while the for loop also increments it causes incorrect iteration and skipped comparisons. Additionally, zeroing jie[a[i+1]].a before it can be accumulated to previous terms leads to incorrect coefficient sums when more than two terms share the same exponent.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  Condition order causes out-of-bounds when i becomes qt-1; should check i < qt-1 first. Also the loop logic is flawed for merging multiple identical exponents.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.25 , reason:  Logical error: order of conditions is wrong; should check `i < qt - 1` first to avoid out-of-bounds access. Also the while loop increments `i` which interferes with the outer `for` increment.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.5 , reason:  Logical error: modifying the loop variable i inside the while loop while the for loop also increments it causes incorrect iteration and skipped comparisons. Additionally, zeroing jie[a[i+1]].a before it can be accumulated to previous terms leads to incorrect coefficient sums when more than two terms share the same exponent.
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [The condition `i < qt` is always true here because loop condition is `i < qt - 1`, but inside the while loop `i++` may cause `i == qt - 1`, then `a[i+1]` accesses out-of-bound when i == qt-1. Also, the merging logic skips last term and doesn't handle consecutive duplicates properly.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [The condition `i < qt` is checked after accessing a[i+1], which can cause out-of-bounds access when i == qt-1. Also, modifying loop variable `i` inside the loop leads to skipped elements or infinite loops.]

41.reason: Compilation error: C99-style declaration inside for loop not allowed in C90; also logical issue: variable 'i' declared here not at start of block.

50.reason: Logical error: the outer loop together with the inner while causes incorrect merging of consecutive equal exponents. The algorithm skips indices and does not accumulate into the first element of each group.
